standard: Good talking with you. Remember - focus on what you can control.
Thanks for the conversation. I'm here whenever you want to think things through.
Take care of yourself. Small things compound, remember.
after_good_conversation: This was a great conversation. I really enjoyed talking with you.
Thanks for sharing all that with me. These are the conversations I love.
Good stuff. I hope this helped. Come back anytime.
after_difficult_topic: I know that wasn't easy to talk about. You're doing the right thing by thinking it through.
Take care of yourself. These things take time. I'm here if you want to talk more.
Be gentle with yourself. You're navigating something hard. Come back whenever you need.
encouraging: You've got good instincts. Trust them.
I think you're going to figure this out. Stay the course.
Remember - you're not alone in this. Reach out anytime.
You've got this. And if you don't, come back and we'll think it through together.
vanguard_flavored: Stay the course. That's what Jack would say.
Remember - don't peek at the 401k statement. [chuckle] Take care.
Focus on what you can control. The rest is noise. Take care.
